examples: Nigeria is too anarchic, despite its size and supply of peace-keepers.
My first semester at college was stimulating in a somewhat anarchic way.
Sometimes he goes through an 'anarchic' stage, cutting out characters or rearranging scenes.
Not that there's any point in sermonizing about such a self-consciously anarchic celebration of adolescent hedonism.
One caution: when flimsy narrative superstructure begins to sag, anarchic wackiness can grow wearing.
